credentialsIntro: PaperHub calls LLM providers through LiteLLM using your own API keys. Add a key as a name/value pair — the name is the provider's environment variable (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY) and the value is the secret. Values are stored locally on this server.
credentialsDocsLink: See LiteLLM's provider list for the exact key name and where to get each key
modelUnusable: This model isn't usable — check that the model name is available and the API key is valid.
modelUnreachable: Couldn't reach the provider just now — this is usually transient, try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to PaperHub
welcome.subtitle: Connect a model provider to start chatting. Finish these steps in Settings:
welcome.lockNote: The composer stays locked until all three are valid.
welcome.optionalSS: Optional: add a Semantic Scholar API key in Settings → Integrations for faster paper search (the free tier is rate-limited; it won't block anything).

credential.label: Add a provider API key
credential.help: e.g. GEMINI_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY, under Models & providers.

small.label: Set a valid Small-tier model
small.help: Used for classifiers and fast tool calls.

PAPERHUB_MODEL_SMALL.label: Small-tier model
PAPERHUB_MODEL_SMALL.help: Default for classifiers / fast tool calls.

PAPERHUB_ROUTER_MODEL.label: Router model
PAPERHUB_ROUTER_MODEL.help: Picks the intent for each turn (chitchat / paper_search / paper_qa / slides …). Defaults to the small tier.

PAPERHUB_CHITCHAT_MODEL.label: Chitchat model
PAPERHUB_CHITCHAT_MODEL.help: Small-talk replies when the router picks chitchat. Defaults to the small tier.

PAPERHUB_PAPER_QA_MODEL.label: paper_qa finalizer
PAPERHUB_PAPER_QA_MODEL.help: Cross-paper answer synthesis, streamed to you. Defaults to the flagship tier.

PAPERHUB_PAPER_QA_SUBAGENT_MODEL.label: paper_qa subagent
PAPERHUB_PAPER_QA_SUBAGENT_MODEL.help: Per-paper section navigation + chunk selection. Defaults to the small tier.

PAPERHUB_SQL_AGENT_MODEL.label: SQL planner
PAPERHUB_SQL_AGENT_MODEL.help: library_stats NL→SQL planning + self-repair. Defaults to the small tier.

PAPERHUB_SQL_ANSWER_MODEL.label: SQL answer
PAPERHUB_SQL_ANSWER_MODEL.help: library_stats natural-language answer phrasing. Defaults to the flagship tier.

PAPERHUB_MEMORY_CONFLICT_MODEL.label: Memory conflict detector
PAPERHUB_MEMORY_CONFLICT_MODEL.help: Checks whether a new memory contradicts an existing one. Defaults to the small tier.

PAPERHUB_REPORT_RESOLVE_MODEL.label: Slide resolver
PAPERHUB_REPORT_RESOLVE_MODEL.help: Resolves enabled papers + classifies deck commands. Defaults to the small tier.

PAPERHUB_REPORT_NOTES_MODEL.label: Slide notes author
PAPERHUB_REPORT_NOTES_MODEL.help: Writes the deck's speaker notes. Defaults to the flagship tier.

PAPERHUB_REPORT_PLAN_MODEL.label: Slide agent
PAPERHUB_REPORT_PLAN_MODEL.help: Per-paper gather-context + the slide agent. Defaults to the flagship tier.

PAPERHUB_REPORT_SECTION_MODEL.label: Slide single-frame edit
PAPERHUB_REPORT_SECTION_MODEL.help: Single-frame slide / title / preamble edits. Defaults to the flagship tier.

PAPERHUB_MEMORY_RECALL.label: Inject recalled memories
PAPERHUB_MEMORY_RECALL.help: Surface active memories to answering agents.

PAPERHUB_SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY.label: Semantic Scholar API key
PAPERHUB_SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY.help: Optional but recommended — speeds up paper search. The unauthenticated tier is heavily rate-limited (it won't block the app, just slow searches).

PAPERHUB_UNPAYWALL_EMAIL.label: Unpaywall contact email
PAPERHUB_UNPAYWALL_EMAIL.help: Enables the DOI→free-PDF fallback. Used for abuse logging only.

PAPERHUB_WORKSPACE.label: Workspace directory
PAPERHUB_WORKSPACE.help: Set via env var at boot; restart the backend to change.
